title: Ubiquiti UACC-G5-Dome-Ultra-FM-W, flush mount for UVC-G5-DOME
category: Ubiquiti UACC-G5-Dome-Ultra-FM-W, flush mount for UVC-G5-DOME
description: UACC-G5-Dome-Ultra-FM-W is used for mounting UVC-G5-DOME cameras in ceiling or in the wall. Thanks to the holder with a depth of 88 mm, you can mount your camera in such a way that it disturbs the overall appearance of the interior as little as possible
